title: Monetary cost savings using Monday.com AI
excerpt:

posts.author: Kate.wyeth (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Before I can enable the full AI features for our company, I need to provide a business case which includes a estimated monetary savings. we have around 60 users currently.

Is anyone able to provide any rough costs savings they’ve experienced that I could use as an example?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s hard to estimate without knowing your business use case and where you plan to use AI. Do you have ideas on that?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Kate.wyeth
What’s worked for us is estimating savings based on time reduced on repetitive work (status updates, writing task summaries, drafting emails, creating action items, etc.). Even a conservative benchmark like 10–20 minutes saved per user per day adds up fast at 60 seats, and you can convert that directly into $ using your average fully loaded hourly rate.

If you’d like hands-on help or want us to walk through this live, you can book a 1:1 paid 60-minute strategy session with our team here:
Calendly
